title: IVR Call Job
description: IVR v1 call job contract for order confirmation only. IVR is not sales, CRM, marketing, payment, delivery, warehouse, MISA, or ROAS.
$comment: Sources: PACK-09 and TECH-09. IVR applies only to Official Order confirmation, not Quote, Cart, or Order Draft. TODO: PACK-09 describes program-based attempts, while TECH-09 V1.0 locks MAX_ATTEMPT_PER_ORDER = 2; keep policy fields explicit until owner resolves final contract.

official_order_id.description: Official Order identifier. Quote, Cart, and Order Draft are not eligible.

call_purpose.description: Invariant: IVR is only for order confirmation.

max_attempts.description: Max attempts resolved by policy. TODO: resolve PACK-09 program-based attempts vs TECH-09 V1.0 max 2.

eligible.description: Whether order is eligible for IVR order confirmation.

status.description: Call job status. TODO: define official IVR job status enum.

not_for_quote_cart_draft.description: Invariant: IVR does not run for Quote, Cart, or Order Draft.
